html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Polio.bOPV plus IPV schedule table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: First bOPV dose from the primary series was administered
First IPV dose from the primary series was administered
Second bOPV dose from the primary series was administered
Second IPV dose from the primary series was administered
Third bOPV dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Polio.bOPV plus IPV schedule table in the Immunization CPG

name.value: First bOPV dose from the primary series was administered
First IPV dose from the primary series was administered
Second bOPV dose from the primary series was administered
Second IPV dose from the primary series was administered
Third bOPV dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
